heading: Land acquisition
label: 410nnn–3 Land acquisition
text: Within the historical park, the Secretary is authorized to acquire lands and interest in lands by donation, purchase with donated or appropriated funds, or exchange. Lands or interests in lands owned by the State of Texas or political subdivisions thereof may be acquired only by donation.
notes: Amendments2009— substituted “historical park” for “historic site”.Pub. L. 111–11
amendments: Amendments2009— substituted “historical park” for “historic site”.Pub. L. 111–11
